the frequency with which the patient is moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite – being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
